title: Smallify
description: Makes every player model have smaller legs!
body:
# Smallify

This is a simple client side mod that make the legs of every player half the size while staying completely client side! (servers do not require this mod for player legs to look small to you)

![Small Player Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8144bcbbe9aba05134652e4040b9ec7cb6219b1.png)
